name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off if the timing's right
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no pressure at all, life gets busy and we get it. We just wanted you to know the chair's still here whenever you're ready.

If it helps, here's a personal 20% off code for your next visit — cleaning, check-up, or anything else on the list:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Just mention it (or use it at checkout) when you book.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear about it — hit reply, it comes straight to us. We're always trying to make dental care feel a little less scary, and honest feedback is how we get there.

Take care,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
